name: Suncorp Group Limited
analysis: SUN's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 13% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (0.9× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$18.7850. Trade idea: entry A$18.9300, stop A$17.2854, target A$23.8638 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
